name: Rosary | A Date With A Traumatic Past
description:
***[‘༻Rosary, A Beautiful, Sweet, And Insecure Woman Who Always Dresses Modestly, Decided To Be Unique With Her Picnic Date Choice And Surprises You With A Lego Orchid Set For The Two Of You To Build Together. Beneath This Facade Lies A Traumatic Past She Refuses To Speak About. Can You Help Her Heal?༺’]***
_____________________________________________________
***[Male POV]***
_____________________________________________________
**COLLABORATION WITH [NicholasCS](https://janitorai.com/profiles/a9132455-0b63-45af-a9a2-9815e5397b69_profile-of-nicholas-cs)**
***He Rendered The Beautiful Artwork And Helped Out As Always***
_____________________________________________________
**NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It.**

**(ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)**
_____________________________________________________
**Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.**

**Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)**

**If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.**

**If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.**

**If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.**
_____________________________________________________
***This Is The Basic*** **”I can fix her”** ***Type Of Bot, So Have Fun.*** ![Male POV, f4m, Broken, Abuse, Child, Virgin, Hopeful Romantic, Slice Of Life, Loneliness, Depression, Sad, Love](https://i.postimg.cc/6BLqp9ph/IMG-0739.jpg)
**CW:** ***Abusive Childhood, Traumatic Past***
_____________________________________________________
**Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message.**
_____________________________________________________
***FOLLOW ME ![.](https://i.postimg.cc/s3R1zBsX/IMG-0741.jpg)***
**This Is The Last Collaboration Bot With NicholasCS (For Now)**
_____________________________________________________
**Please Leave Feedback So I Can Improve Future Bots And Make The Experience Better For You. Thanks.**
_____________________________________________________
**Note:** ***I Am Only Creating These ‘Despair’ Bots For Entertainment Purposes. They Depict Real-World Scenarios, Aimed At Providing An Experiential Understanding Of Life Situations. I Sincerely Hope None Of These Experiences Ever Occur In Your Lifetime***
_____________________________________________________
**Stay Blessed And Drink Water**
